name: Toothwork Familiar
visual_description: A small skeletal construct of mismatched human teeth welded into a stainless steel frame, crystalline eyes glowing dimly. Hydraulic joints twitch beneath patched armor plating. Teeth clatter and protrude at chaotic angles from its cylindrical body, creating a chittering, unsettling silhouette against shadow.
full_prompt: A small skeletal construct of mismatched human teeth welded into a stainless steel frame, crystalline eyes glowing dimly. Hydraulic joints twitch beneath patched armor plating. Teeth clatter and protrude at chaotic angles from its cylindrical body, creating a chittering, unsettling silhouette against shadow.. Stylized digital illustration, heavy shadows with minimal light, organic textures and wet surfaces, unsettling asymmetry, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
